text.title: Golden Paths: Opinionated Self-Service Templates Core Rules
text.summary: 6 testable rules including a `skip-this-methodology` rule. Each pairs a binary check with sourced rationale.

rule.statement: Golden paths MUST be opt-in (with strong defaults), not mandatory; mandatory paths breed shadow infra.
rule.rationale: Operational rationale tying the rule to the cited source.

rule.statement: Every template MUST embed CI, observability, security scans, and ownership tags by default.
rule.rationale: Operational rationale tying the rule to the cited source.

rule.statement: Adoption rate (golden-path usage / total provisioning) MUST be tracked; the target is ≥80% within 6 months of launch.
rule.rationale: Operational rationale tying the rule to the cited source.

rule.statement: Templates MUST be semver-versioned and published; in-place mutation of templates is rejected.
rule.rationale: Operational rationale tying the rule to the cited source.

rule.statement: Every template MUST document the escape hatch (how to deviate when the path does not fit) — silent deviation rejected.
rule.rationale: Operational rationale tying the rule to the cited source.

rule.statement: Skip when org pre-product-market-fit OR platform team <0.5 FTE.
rule.rationale: Operational rationale tying the rule to the cited source.
